title: Appeal in Kerala High Court challenges refusal to include transgender candidates in National Cadet Corps
description: A Division Bench of the Kerala High Court recently issued notice on plea for the inclusion of transgender candidates in the National Cadet Corps (NCC) [Janvin Cleetus v Union of India & ors].The appeal was moved by a transman, who has challenged a single-judge Bench ruling from November 2025 which held that transgender candidates are not entitled to enroll with the NCC under the existing National Cadet Corps Act, 1948. The single-judge Bench had reasoned that the NCC Act, in its current vers
